title: 现代汽车在机器人世界杯上展示人形机器人
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. showcased its Atlas humanoid robot at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting its technical progress on football’s biggest stage as the South Korean automaker gears up for mass production and factory deployment.（原题：Hyundai Motor Showcases Humanoid at World Cup in Robotics Push）

title: 情境为王：Avride 如何使用云 VLM 作为送货机器人的安全网
summary: Avride uses vision-language models, or VLMs, to improve the environmental awareness of its delivery robots. The post Context is king: How Avride uses cloud VLMs as a safety net for delivery robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Context is king: How Avride uses cloud VLMs as a safety net for delivery robots）
